name_cn:
Top-tier original with full packaging
Mini Denim in stock!!️
Groove 16 Boston Mini bag, irresistibly cute. A simple bag shape that is retro and high-end. Crafted from unique gradient denim fabric, it is exquisite yet full of fashion sense. Can be carried by hand or crossbody, lightweight and convenient to carry, and the capacity is quite sufficient for daily use
size:17*10*8cm
